name: finance-toolkit
description: 200+ financial metrics, ratios, and economic indicators directly in your AI assistant, no Python installation required.
long_description: The Finance Toolkit MCP Server exposes 200+ pre-computed financial metrics, models, and economic indicators to any AI assistant that supports the Model Context Protocol. Query valuation ratios, profitability metrics, risk measures, technical indicators, fixed income valuations, macroeconomic data, ESG scores, and more — all backed by the open-source Finance Toolkit's transparent calculation methods. Requires a (free) Financial Modeling Prep API key obtainable [here](https://www.jeroenbouma.com/fmp).

tools.name: get_valuation_ratios
tools.description: Pre-computed valuation ratios (P/E, EPS, EV/EBITDA, P/B, P/S, PEG, dividend yield, FCF yield, market cap). Requires tickers.

tools.name: get_profitability_ratios
tools.description: Pre-computed profitability ratios (gross margin, operating margin, net margin, ROE, ROA, ROIC, ROCE). Requires tickers.

tools.name: get_liquidity_ratios
tools.description: Pre-computed liquidity ratios (current ratio, quick ratio, cash ratio, working capital). Requires tickers.

tools.name: get_solvency_ratios
tools.description: Pre-computed solvency ratios (debt-to-equity, interest coverage, debt-to-assets, net debt to EBITDA). Requires tickers.

tools.name: get_efficiency_ratios
tools.description: Pre-computed efficiency ratios (asset turnover, inventory turnover, days sales outstanding, cash conversion cycle). Requires tickers.

tools.name: get_momentum_indicators
tools.description: Momentum technical indicators (RSI, MACD, Stochastic Oscillator, Williams %R, Aroon). Applied to price data automatically. Requires tickers.

tools.name: get_overlap_indicators
tools.description: Overlap technical indicators (SMA, EMA, Bollinger Bands, Keltner Channels). Applied to price data automatically. Requires tickers.

tools.name: get_volatility_indicators
tools.description: Volatility technical indicators (ATR, True Range). Applied to price data automatically. Requires tickers.

tools.name: get_breadth_indicators
tools.description: Market breadth technical indicators (McClellan Oscillator, OBV, Advance/Decline Line, Chaikin). Requires tickers.

tools.name: get_models
tools.description: Pre-computed financial models (WACC, DuPont analysis, Altman Z-Score, Piotroski F-Score, intrinsic value/DCF). Requires tickers.

tools.name: get_performance
tools.description: Pre-computed risk-adjusted performance metrics (Sharpe ratio, Sortino ratio, Alpha, Beta, CAPM, Fama-French factors). Requires tickers.

tools.name: get_risk
tools.description: Pre-computed risk metrics (VaR, CVaR, GARCH volatility, max drawdown, skewness, kurtosis). Requires tickers.

tools.name: get_options
tools.description: Option pricing and Greeks (Black-Scholes, binomial tree, delta, gamma, theta, vega, rho, implied volatility). Requires tickers.

tools.name: get_fixed_income_valuations
tools.description: Bond and derivative valuation calculations (bond duration, present value, yield-to-maturity, derivative pricing). No tickers needed.

tools.name: get_interest_rates
tools.description: Interest rate data (central bank rates, short/long-term rates, government bond yields, ICE BofA series, EURIBOR, ECB, Fed rates). Requires countries.

tools.name: get_general_economy
tools.description: Macroeconomic indicators by country (GDP, CPI, inflation, trade balance, investment, consumption, confidence indices, house/rent prices). Requires countries.

tools.name: get_government_economy
tools.description: Government fiscal metrics by country (debt, deficit, expenditure, revenue, tax revenue, trust in government). Requires countries.

tools.name: get_jobs_and_society
tools.description: Labour and social metrics by country (unemployment rate, labour productivity, population statistics, poverty rate, income inequality). Requires countries.

tools.name: get_environment
tools.description: Environmental and ESG data. ESG scores use tickers; carbon footprint and renewable energy use countries. Accepts both.

tools.name: get_toolkit_data
tools.description: Raw financial data (historical prices, income statement, balance sheet, cash flow, company profile, quotes, analyst estimates). Requires tickers.

tools.name: get_discovery
tools.description: Market discovery tools (lists of stocks/ETFs/cryptocurrencies, stock screener, gainers, losers, sector performance). No tickers needed.

tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: List all registered tool categories with metric counts and descriptions.

tools.name: list_metrics_by_category
tools.description: List all metrics within a specific category.

tools.name: search_metrics
tools.description: Fuzzy keyword search across all 200+ available metrics.

tools.name: search_instruments
tools.description: Look up ticker symbols by company name, ISIN, CIK, or keyword.
